ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gas_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gas measurement */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "sample_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in Kelvin during the measurement */,
  "x_coordinate" REAL /* X coordinate of the measurement location */,
  "y_coordinate" REAL /* Y coordinate of the measurement location */,
  "z_coordinate" REAL /* Z coordinate (elevation) of the measurement location */,
  "CH4" REAL /* Concentration of methane (CH4) in ppm */,
  "O2" REAL /* Concentration of oxygen (O2) in ppm */,
  "CO2" REAL /* Concentration of carbon dioxide (CO2) in ppm */,
  "CO" REAL /* Concentration of carbon monoxide (CO) in ppm */,
  "Ar" REAL /* Concentration of argon (Ar) in ppm */,
  "C2H2" REAL /* Concentration of acetylene (C2H2) in ppm */,
  "H2" REAL /* Concentration of hydrogen (H2) in ppm */,
  "H2O" REAL /* Concentration of water vapor (H2O) in ppm */,
  "N2" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen (N2) in ppm */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_measurements_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gas_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the measurement location in meters */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for emergency contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gas measurement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the measurement */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES gas_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last calibrated */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the equipment (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "default_thresholds" TEXT /* JSON object containing default threshold values for different gases */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the measurement type (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high concentration) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the resolution of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES gas_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calibration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration log */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment that was calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibrated_by" TEXT /* Name of the individual who performed the calibration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the calibration event */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_report" TEXT /* Path to the calibration report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calibration_logs_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement condition record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement associated with the condition */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage at the time of measurement */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa at the time of measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of measurement */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation at the time of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_conditions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES gas_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_backup" (
  "backup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated gas measurement */,
  "backup_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the backup was created */,
  "backup_data" TEXT /* Serialized data of the gas measurement */,
  "backup_size" INTEGER /* Size of the backup data in bytes */,
  "backup_status" TEXT /* Status of the backup (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "backup_location" TEXT /* Location where the backup is stored (e.g., cloud, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_backup_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES gas_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the data analysis */,
  "conclusions" TEXT /* Conclusions drawn from the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES gas_measurements ("measurement_id")
)
